title: Internet of things capable of two way communicating with pet animal using mobile phone
abstract: Provided are a system and a method for protecting a pet through bidirectional communication. For this, the system includes a main terminal controlling an operation of a home appliance connected to a wired or wireless network and receiving voice and video information of the pet from one of the home appliance and a camera and microphone built therein and a user terminal receiving and outputting the voice and video information from the main terminal through the wired or wireless network and receiving and transmitting a control command input by a user and voice and image information of the user to the main terminal. The main terminal outputs the voice and image information of the user transmitted from the user terminal through a display unit and a speaker built therein. An operation of one of the home appliance and the main terminal is controlled according to the control command.
claims: Claims ( 6 ) An Internet of things (IoT)-based system which allows communication with a pet using a smartphone through real-time bidirectional communication, the system comprising: a main terminal controlling an operation of a home appliance connected to a wired or wireless network and receiving voice and video information of the pet from one of the home appliance and a camera and microphone built therein; a user terminal receiving and outputting the voice and video information from the main terminal through the wired or wireless network and receiving and transmitting a control command input by a user and voice and image information of the user to the main terminal; and a server performing an authentication process to allow real-time bidirectional communication between the main terminal and the user terminal, wherein the main terminal and the user terminal are provided as one or more, respectively, to perform the authentication process through the server and are configured to perform the real-time bidirectional communication in one of one-to-one, one-to-many, many-to-one, and many-to-many methods through an Internet network comprising a mobile communication network, Wi-Fi, and a wired local area network (LAN), and wherein the main terminal analyzes frequency characteristics of the voice information of the pet, compares the analyzed frequency characteristics with frequency characteristic information of the pet included in a database, and automatically gives the user terminal a call to allow voice-and-video-based real-time bidirectional communication when the pet is in a preset specific state. The system of claim 1, wherein the main terminal outputs the image information of a user of the user terminal as a certain shape and size in the center of a screen of one of the home appliance and the camera built therein and outputs the color spectrum videoin other areas of the screen of one of the home appliance and the camera built therein, in which the image information of the user is not outputted. The system of claim 1, wherein the main terminal determines a state of the pet based on the received voice and video information of the pet, automatically determines an output signal necessary for the pet based on information of the determined state according to a preset algorithm, and generates the determined output signal by controlling one of the home appliance and the main terminal. The system of claim 3, wherein the main terminal determines acoustic information necessary for the pet based on the information of the determined state and outputs the determined acoustic information through a speaker of one of the home appliance and the main terminal. The system of claim 1, wherein the user terminal comprises: a communication unit transmitting and receiving data with the main terminal through the wired or wireless network; a camera unit obtaining the image information of the user; a microphone unit obtaining the voice information of the user; an input unit receiving the control command of the user; and a control unit controlling an overall operation of the user terminal. The system of claim 1, wherein the server stores a serial number S/N of the main terminal and identification(ID)/password(PW) information of the user of the user terminal, wherein the main terminal stores identification information, and wherein the user terminal accesses the server to perform an authentication for the ID/PW information and an authentication for the serial number, accesses the main terminal to perform an authentication for the identification information and an authentication for the serial number, and succeeds in accessing the main terminal to transmit and receive data therewith only when the authentications succeed.
